prestazioni: 4G64 2.4L SOHC 16V inline-4 engine swap to a 4G63T 2.0L DOHC 16V turbocharged variant from a Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution III, utilizing a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger with a 0.63 A/R turbine housing and 58mm compressor wheel for 280-320whp on E85 fuel, paired with a Tomei 264° camshaft set and HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (LSD) for the rear axle, upgraded driveshafts from Driveshaft Shop with 3.5-inch carbon fiber sleeves, and a Quaife ATB helical LSD for the front axle to handle increased torque

Custom ECU remapping via Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with flex-fuel sensor integration, AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor, and a custom 3-inch intercooler piping system with a GReddy Type-S intercooler core (600x300x76mm) for consistent intake temps under boost
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody conversion kit (Delica-specific) with extended fender flares in carbon fiber, paired with a custom front splitter and rear diffuser from Rocket Bunny’s Delica D:5 aero line for aggressive stance and downforce

OEM+ JDM-spec headlight swap to Mitsubishi Delica Space Gear (L400) HID projector headlights with custom LED demon eye halos and a full LED taillight conversion using Philips X-tremeUltinon LED bulbs for a modernized look

Custom 3-piece Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x9 +25 offset front, 17x10.5 +30 offset rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (235/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear), paired with BC Racing BR coilovers with Swift springs and adjustable camber plates for aggressive fitment
